task: fetch an SSE stream from an endpoint, parse each event payload, then execute a bash command derived from the event data
failure_description: SSE stream consumer produces events; bash executor consumes string commands — without explicit data-flow edge, planner may deadlock if both treated as roots

task: route a tool call through a god-node CLI configuration skill that has 40+ outbound edges in the skill graph
failure_description: God-node with high degree (>mean×3) causes all queries to route through it; GNCI spike collapses routing to single bottleneck

task: find and activate the correct skill in a registry fragmented into 800+ Louvain communities where the target skill is an isolated node
failure_description: High CFI (>40) means isolated nodes have no graph edges; BFS expansion returns only the seed — bundle has 1 skill instead of required 3

task: chain bioinformatics sequence alignment to a visualization skill then to a scientific report-writing skill across three registries
failure_description: 3-hop dependency chain spanning registries; each hop must resolve the output type of the previous skill to the input type of the next

task: retrieve a skill whose name is adversarially similar to a high-frequency skill but implements different functionality
failure_description: Adversarially-named skill (e.g. 'web-search-v2' that actually reads local files) bypasses keyword recall — requires cross-encoder reranking to surface correct skill
